name: EuiPageHeader
description: Page-level header with title, description, breadcrumbs, and action buttons.
visualDescription: A horizontal page-level header bar sitting at the top of the content area (below the global Kibana chrome). Left side: optional breadcrumbs above a large page title, with an optional description line below the title. Right side: one or more action buttons aligned to the top-right. Optional tabs row at the bottom of the header. NOT the global EuiHeader (which is the app-wide top bar with the Elastic logo and nav). NOT a section heading inside a page.

iconType.description: Optional icon to place to the left of the title

responsive.description:
Set to false if you don't want the children to stack at small screen sizes.
Set to `reverse` to display the right side content first for the sake of hierarchy (like global time)

breadcrumbs.description: Optional array breadcrumbs that render before the `pageTitle`

description.description:
Position is dependent on existing with a `pageTitle` or `tabs`
Automatically get wrapped in a single paragraph tag inside an EuiText block

iconProps.description: Additional EuiIcon props to apply to the optional icon

alignItems.description:
Vertical alignment of the left and right side content;
Default is `center` for custom content, but `top` for when `pageTitle` or `tabs` are included

restrictWidth.description:
Sets the max-width of the page,
set to `true` to use the default size of `1200px`,
set to `false` to not restrict the width,
set to a number for a custom width in px,
set to a string for a custom width in custom measurement.

rightSideItems.description:
Pass custom an array of content to this side usually up to 3 buttons.
The first button should be primary, usually with `fill`. At larger breakpoints, items will
render from right to left, but will collapse vertically and render left to right on smaller mobile screens.

rightSideGroupProps.description: Additional EuiFlexGroup props to pass to the container of the `rightSideItems`

pageTitle.description:
Wrapped in an `H1` so choose appropriately.
A simple string is best

pageTitleProps.description: Additional props to pass to the EuiTitle

tabs.description:
In-app navigation presented as large borderless tabs.
Accepts an array of `EuiTab` objects;

tabsProps.description:
Any extras to apply to the outer tabs container.
Extends `EuiTabs`

bottomBorder.description:
Adds a bottom border to separate it from the content after;
Passing `extended` will ensure the border touches the sides of the parent container.

example: <EuiPageHeader paddingSize="none" responsive pageTitle="Page title" iconType="logoKibana" description="Example of a description." bottomBorder="extended" />
